note: Canonical backlog items for the Plai workspace. Browser-created items are temporary drafts until committed into this file or a future backend store.

items.item: Move component toggles to market-level Knowledge documents
Treat component screens as implementation records, not source of truth
Simplify Codex handoff now that PlayAI is a standalone app
Split collection requirements from dashboard/reporting requirements
Move PlayAI from the top bar to a permanent side navigation with a larger work area
Rename Knowledge Base references consistently so the workspace uses Knowledge Base instead of Market knowledge base
Create, edit, save and delete individual requirement lines, update the generated prompt, and highlight regulatory conflicts without blocking acceptance
Highlight non-compliant Knowledge documents and add a dedicated non-compliant filter in the list view
Add Knowledge requirements for field order, step order, validation rules and red helper text under invalid entries across every form
Allow individual requirement rows to be locked with a lock toggle so key requirements can show future control without adding access control yet
Always reset workspace navigation to list view and put All first in list filters
Keep catalogue refresh and component toggles inside market configuration rather than global workspace navigation
Add rules in the Deposit Limits Knowledge Base for which amounts appear as quick buttons
Introduce saved workspace views so reviewers can jump between Market setup, Knowledge review and launch-readiness views
items.benefit: Reduces navigation effort during demos and lets reviewers return to common work patterns quickly.

items.item: Add a launch-readiness checklist that rolls up Knowledge status, brand leaks, catalogue health and required compliance components
items.benefit: Creates a clear pre-demo and pre-launch confidence check so missing compliance, brand or data items are visible early.

items.item: Add prompt diff previews so reviewers can see exactly what a Knowledge change would ask Codex to update before queueing it
items.benefit: Improves trust in the Knowledge-to-Codex workflow by showing the impact before a change request is queued.

items.item: Rename the Chrome extension to PlayAI and update the extension logo and description to match the workspace product
Add alternate row background shading to the shared PlayAI list renderer
Remove the Site option from PlayAI navigation because the customer site can be launched from the Markets area
Vertically centre PlayAI side-nav items and add a subtle hover background state
When a user clicks the current PlayAI navigation item, return that area to its list view instead of leaving the detail view open
Rename PlayAI to JackpotAI everywhere, including workspace labels, product copy, extension naming and supporting assets
Open backlog rows into a detail view with a back button, plus edit, save and delete controls before the item has started implementation
Add a quick-entry row above the backlog table so new backlog items can be captured with Unassessed status and no priority until reviewed
Show the full backlog item description in the list by wrapping text within the row and final description cell
Move the project into the existing GitHub repository plai-os/plai once the backlog and logo fixes are stable
items.detail: Steps: export the backlog JSON from the Backlog screen, make a clean project backup, move backlog source data into a repo-backed JSON/workspace data file so it is no longer dependent on browser storage, initialise Git for this folder if needed, create a first baseline checkpoint, connect the remote repository at https://github.com/plai-os/plai, push the baseline, then use branches for larger changes so demos can be rolled back safely.
